name: Hamburgers with Onions, Swedish Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Shape the meat into 4 or 5 patties, handling it as little as possible.
2. Melt half the butter in a skillet.
3. Add the onions and sauté over low heat until golden.
4. Add the pepper rings and 1/2 cup boiling water.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Remove from heat and keep warm.
6. Season the meat on both sides.
7. Sauté it in the remaining butter in the skillet until it reaches the desired doneness.
8. Top each patty with the onion mixture.
9. Serve with potatoes and cucumbers if desired.
10. Makes 4-5 servings.
